meaning: n.nominal名义上的,有名无实的 Nominative[语]主格的
examples: She writes under the nom de plume of Alison Cooper.
His real name was Sabri al-Banna, but he became widely known by his nom de guerre, Abu Nidal.
Only one Cylon raider ship was named by the Viper pilots. What was its nom DE guerre?
He spoke on condition he be identified by his nom de guerre to avoid reprisals.
At the same time, the ZeptoLab team wanted to introduce new characters without sacrificing Om Nom's brand recognition.
